---
title: "historic_districts_exploration"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
# Load packages
library(tidyverse)
library(tidygeocoder)
library(janitor)
library(tidytext)
library(leaflet)
```

```{r}
# Cleaning the historic_districts dataset so only the columns we want are present (add later)
```


--

```{r}
# Import cleaned (sort of) dataset
historic_districts <- read_csv("../data/Historic Districts/historic_districts_clean2.csv")

# Mapping w/ leaflet!
prelim_map <- leaflet(data = historic_districts) %>%
   addTiles() %>%
   addCircleMarkers(~longitude, ~latitude, popup = ~property_name)
prelim_map
```

```{r}
# Now I want to do the chloropleth by area by state (?) -- group by state
```


640 acres in 1 mile

```{r}
# Actually what I want is to group by state and then ...

# MAYBE SHOULD JOIN DATA FOR THE TOTAL ACREAGE OF THE WHOLE STATE TO STANDARDIZE

acreage_by_state <- historic_districts %>% 
  group_by(state) %>% 
  summarise(total_acreage = sum(acreage_of_property, na.rm=TRUE))

```

```{r}
# Chloropleth map for # of acres of districts
# acreage_of_property na.rm = TRUE --> ignore missing values

# Create a color palette for the map
my_palette <- colorNumeric(
  palette = "viridis", domain = historic_districts$acreage_of_property,
  na.color = "transparent"
)

# Basic choropleth with leaflet
choro_state_acreage <- leaflet(data = historic_districts) %>% 
  addTiles() %>% 
  addPolygons(lng = historic_districts$longitude, 
              lat = historic_districts$latitude, 
              fillColor = ~ my_palette(acreage_of_property))

choro_state_acreage
```

```{r}
# Create a color palette for the map:
mypalette <- colorNumeric(
  palette = "viridis", domain = world_sf$POP2005,
  na.color = "transparent"
)
mypalette(c(45, 43))

# Basic choropleth with leaflet?
m <- leaflet(world_sf) %>%
  addTiles() %>%
  setView(lat = 10, lng = 0, zoom = 2) %>%
  addPolygons(fillColor = ~ mypalette(POP2005), stroke = FALSE)

m

# save the widget in a html file if needed.
# library(htmlwidgets)
# saveWidget(m, file=paste0( getwd(), "/HtmlWidget/choroplethLeaflet1.html"))

```
